layman_headline: Fear grips the market — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in a fearful state with most altcoins bleeding against Bitcoin, which continues to dominate at 56.3%. None of the swing candidates present a compelling risk-reward setup today. Several coins like TRUMP and ZRO are approaching oversold levels, but their charts remain bearish with no confirmed reversal signals. The smartest move is to stay on the sidelines and wait for a clearer entry.
layman_action: Keep your cash ready. Don't chase falling knives. Wait for a confirmed bounce or a strong news catalyst before entering any new position.
expert_reasoning: Across all 10 swing candidates, none present a high-conviction setup. ZRO and TRUMP have deeply oversold RSIs (31 and 29 respectively), but both sit below all major moving averages with bearish chart bias scores (-0.70). HTX has the best chart bias (+1.10) with a bullish Marubozu candle, but its RSI at 58 is already elevated after a 7% weekly gain, and the micro-cap token carries extreme liquidity risk. ETHFI shows some promise with a +0.60 chart bias and bullish Marubozu, but it's already up 5.8% today with resistance just 2.5% away — terrible entry timing. With BTC dominance at 56.3% and Fear & Greed at 26, altcoins face a hostile macro environment. High BTC dominance means capital is flowing away from alts. The prudent strategy is HOLD and wait for either a BTC dominance reversal or confirmed oversold bounces with volume confirmation.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.3% creates persistent headwinds for all altcoin positions
Fear & Greed at 26 with geopolitical risk (U.S.-Iran strikes) could push sentiment lower
No confirmed reversal patterns on any oversold candidate — catching falling knives is high-risk
watch_list: ZRO holding $0.90 support — a bounce with volume here could trigger a buy signal
BTC price action around $64K — a decisive move above could shift market sentiment
Fear & Greed index — improving trend from 24 weekly avg to 26 current, watch for move above 30
market_context: The market is in a fear regime with BTC consolidating near $63.8K while altcoins bleed. U.S. strikes on Iran add geopolitical uncertainty, and the crypto IPO market is stalling as capital rotates to AI — not a favorable environment for aggressive altcoin entries.
context_banner: Fear dominates crypto markets amid geopolitical tension and high BTC dominance — capital preservation is the priority until a clear reversal signal emerges.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 ('Fear') with improving trend from 24 weekly average — not yet at extreme fear levels (below 20) where contrarian buys historically work best.
TRUMP RSI at 29 and ZRO RSI at 31 show oversold conditions, but neither has confirmed a reversal with a bullish candle pattern or MACD cross.
U.S. launches fresh Iran strikes creating macro uncertainty — risk-off sentiment likely to persist, weighing on crypto risk appetite.
Bitcoin nearing late stages of bear market per Jamie Coutts — suggests patience will be rewarded as a bottom formation takes shape over coming weeks.
ETH derivatives reset noted alongside DePIN/gaming rebound — suggests selective sector rotation rather than broad alt rally, further supporting patience.
